# Changelog

## [2.0.0](https://github.com/ismail-kattakath/mcp-gateway/compare/v1.1.0...v2.0.0) (2026-06-09)


### ⚠ BREAKING CHANGES

* Auth is now enabled by default with auto-generated keys.

### Features

* multi-transport support with secure auto-generated API keys ([#8](https://github.com/ismail-kattakath/mcp-gateway/issues/8)) ([c08f535](https://github.com/ismail-kattakath/mcp-gateway/commit/c08f53551d2a51963fc66bcb75682ade9ccdd797))
* v3.0 planning infrastructure and v2.1 enhancements ([c7b39d8](https://github.com/ismail-kattakath/mcp-gateway/commit/c7b39d8e433ec5a39264a1f548bb0f4df78fcfd3))
